title: Random Drop Items
description: A simple Fabric mod for 1.21+ where every block you mine drops a completely random item from the game. Chaos awaits!
body:
# 🎲 Random Drops (Fabric)

**Turn your Minecraft world into pure chaos!**

Random Drops is a lightweight Fabric mod that changes the fundamental mechanics of mining. Say goodbye to predictable resources—now, every time you break a block, you roll the dice.

## ✨ Features
* **Total Randomness:** Breaking *any* block triggers a random drop from the entire item registry.
* **Surprise Mechanics:** Mine dirt and get a Diamond Sword? Mine a Diamond Ore and get a Dead Bush? Anything is possible.
* **Simple & Lightweight:** Built using Fabric Mixins for maximum compatibility and minimal performance impact.
* **Survival Ready:** Works in survival mode (but maybe don't use it on your main world if you value sanity!).

## ⚙️ Requirements
* **Minecraft:** 1.21.x
* **Mod Loader:** Fabric Loader
* **Dependencies:** Fabric API

## 🚀 How to Install
1.  Download and install the [Fabric Loader](https://fabricmc.net/use/).
2.  Download the **Fabric API** mod and place it in your `mods` folder.
3.  Download **Random Drops** and place it in your `mods` folder.
4.  Launch the game and start mining!

---
*Note: This mod is intended for fun challenges and chaotic gameplay. Back up your world before installing!*
